_comment: Settings for the spatial detection app. All fields are optional; defaults are used if a field is missing or this file is absent.
_display_comment: screen_size is your touchscreen panel resolution [w, h]. fullscreen hides the cursor and fills the screen. capture_fps is shared by all OAK outputs.
_model_comment: default_model is a display name shown in the GUI picker (e.g. a filename from models/ or a zoo id). Empty = first discovered model. zoo_models are extra Luxonis model-zoo ids offered alongside local NNArchives. bb_scale/depth thresholds tune spatial coordinate sampling.
_capture_comment: Captures (photos, clips, time-lapse) save under save_root in a timestamped session folder. low_storage_mb warns and blocks captures below this free space.
